subcodes.first_line: O faithful friends of the divine Cause! The foundation of eternal comfort and felicity in this world lieth in spiritual attractions of the conscience [3.5s]... ...There are certain pillars which have been established as the unshakable supports of the Faith of God. The mightiest of these is learning and the use of the mind… It hath become apparent from reports that the government’s inspector of education hath passed through that land
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران صادق نابت الهی در این جهان اساس راحت و سعادت ابدی انجذابات وجدانی
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @education of children; moral education, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
